approved_command_preview: Read-only analyze Prime_Agent_DCOIR_Gemini_Orchestrator.md.txt section and rule boundaries; write boundary report to artifact readback only.
command:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$repo = $env:DCOIR_REPO_ROOT
$out = $env:DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR
$target = Join-Path $repo 'project_sources/gemini/bundle_source/01_GEMINI_AGENT_BUILD/Prime_Agent_DCOIR_Gemini_Orchestrator.md.txt'
if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $target -PathType Leaf)) { throw "Missing target prime agent file: $target" }
$py = @'
from __future__ import annotations
import hashlib, json, re, sys
from pathlib import Path

target = Path(sys.argv[1])
out = Path(sys.argv[2])
out.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
text = target.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
lines = text.splitlines()
sha256 = hashlib.sha256(target.read_bytes()).hexdigest()
markers = []
patterns = [
    ('markdown_heading', re.compile(r'^#{1,6}\s+')),
    ('section', re.compile(r'^SECTION\s+\d+[A-Z]?:')),
    ('rule', re.compile(r'^RULE\s+\d+(?:\.\d+)?[A-Z]?:')),
    ('step', re.compile(r'^STEP\s+\d+(?:\.\d+)?[A-Z]?:')),
    ('subsection_number', re.compile(r'^\d+\.\d+\s+')),
]
for idx, line in enumerate(lines, 1):
    for kind, pat in patterns:
        if pat.search(line):
            markers.append({'line': idx, 'kind': kind, 'text': line[:220]})
            break

# Proposed coarse chunks preserve natural instruction areas without editing content.
wanted = [
    ('00_metadata_and_opening', 1),
    ('01_startup_global_rules', next((m['line'] for m in markers if m['text'].startswith('SECTION 1:')), 1)),
    ('02_required_formats', next((m['line'] for m in markers if m['text'].startswith('SECTION 3:')), 1)),
    ('03_investigation_workflow', next((m['line'] for m in markers if m['text'].startswith('SECTION 4:')), 1)),
    ('04_query_and_command_rules', next((m['line'] for m in markers if m['text'].startswith('SECTION 5:')), 0)),
    ('05_alert_family_environment_rules', next((m['line'] for m in markers if m['text'].startswith('SECTION 6:')), 0)),
    ('06_collector_ioc_targeted_collection', next((m['line'] for m in markers if m['text'].startswith('SECTION 7:')), 0)),
    ('07_usb_report_workflow', next((m['line'] for m in markers if 'USB' in m['text'].upper() and m['kind'] in {'section','markdown_heading'}), 0)),
]
wanted = [(name, line) for name, line in wanted if line and line > 0]
# Add a final catch-all chunk if there are major markers after the last proposed boundary.
wanted = sorted(dict((line, name) for name, line in wanted).items())
chunks = []
for i, (line, name) in enumerate(wanted):
    end = (wanted[i+1][0] - 1) if i+1 < len(wanted) else len(lines)
    chunks.append({'chunk_id': f'{i:02d}', 'name': name, 'line_start': line, 'line_end': end, 'line_count': end-line+1, 'first_line': lines[line-1][:220] if line <= len(lines) else ''})
report = {
    'target': target.as_posix(),
    'bytes': target.stat().st_size,
    'lines': len(lines),
    'sha256': sha256,
    'marker_count': len(markers),
    'markers': markers,
    'proposed_chunks': chunks,
}
(out / 'prime_agent_boundary_report.json').write_text(json.dumps(report, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
md = ['# Prime agent boundary analysis', '', f'- target: `{target.as_posix()}`', f'- bytes: {target.stat().st_size}', f'- lines: {len(lines)}', f'- sha256: `{sha256}`', f'- marker_count: {len(markers)}', '', '## Proposed coarse chunks', '']
for c in chunks:
    md.append(f"- {c['chunk_id']} `{c['name']}` lines {c['line_start']}-{c['line_end']} ({c['line_count']} lines): {c['first_line']}")
md.extend(['', '## Boundary markers', ''])
for m in markers:
    md.append(f"- line {m['line']}: [{m['kind']}] {m['text']}")
(out / 'prime_agent_boundary_report.md').write_text('\n'.join(md) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
print(json.dumps({'success': True, 'lines': len(lines), 'markers': len(markers), 'proposed_chunks': len(chunks), 'report': str(out / 'prime_agent_boundary_report.md')}, indent=2))
'@
$script = Join-Path $env:DCOIR_CONFIG_DIR 'analyze_prime_agent_boundaries.py'
$py | Out-File -FilePath $script -Encoding utf8
python $script $target $out
